products.title: Dell G15 Gaming Laptop (i5-13450HX, RTX 3050 6GB, 16GB RAM, 1TB SSD)
products.short_description: Dell G15 gaming laptop powered by Intel Core i5-13450HX and NVIDIA RTX 3050 delivers strong gaming performance, smooth visuals, and fast storage for gamers and power users.
products.long_description:
The Dell G15 gaming laptop is designed for users who need powerful performance for gaming, multitasking, and creative workloads. Powered by the 13th Gen Intel Core i5-13450HX processor, it delivers excellent speed and responsiveness for demanding tasks.

It features NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050 with 6GB VRAM, enabling smooth gameplay at 1080p resolution with high settings. The 15.6-inch Full HD display with a 120Hz refresh rate ensures fluid visuals and an immersive gaming experience.

With 16GB RAM and a 1TB SSD, the laptop provides fast performance, quick boot times, and ample storage for games and files. Dell’s thermal design helps maintain performance during long gaming sessions.

The laptop also includes a backlit keyboard, multiple connectivity ports, and a durable build. While slightly bulky, it is ideal for gamers, students, and professionals who prioritize performance over portability.

special_features: Multiple ports including HDMI 2.1 and USB-C

pros: Strong gaming performance for the price
cons: Display quality is average for price

negative: Battery life is poor under heavy use
Heating issues reported by some users
Display reliability concerns in some cases
